title: Norway Overview
summary: Where Norway is, what it is, what shaped it, and why it matters.

context.headline: The country in one story
context.description: Norway is a long, mountainous country shaped by the sea. Geography created scattered communities, strong coastal cities, and a maritime mindset. Over time, that physical foundation fed into shipping, fisheries, hydropower, and offshore oil and gas, while Nordic institutions built a high-trust welfare state.
context.when: Modern Norway, rooted in long-term geography and state-building
